baseline_test_note: Baseline not run in planning phase. Executor should run the full vitest suite for reigh-app before Phase 1 starts to record pre-existing failures, then ensure no new failures are introduced by each phase.
meta_commentary: Ship as FOUR separate PRs in strict order. Phase 1 is the bug fix and must land and be user-confirmed BEFORE Phase 2 begins — do not batch. Phase 3 has two flagged gotchas: (a) the `editVersionRef`/per-save comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 is the ONLY thing safe to delete; `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 MUST be preserved (FLAG-001). (b) Before removing the comparator, confirm via grep that NO free-text field still routes through per-keystroke debounced autosave — main prompt, Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69), custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357) are the known ones; grep `setSettings({` for other text callers. Phase 2 step 7 (T8) is a decision point: do NOT pre-commit to Path A (wrap-in-providers) vs Path B (pure-props). Read LightboxStateContext, ImageEditFormContext, and variants provider surfaces first, compare diff size, and pick the smaller one. Critical regression risk: InlineEditView currently depends on `stateOverrides.coreState.onClose` — deleting stateOverrides without supplying a real onClose via provider will break the inline-edit close button. For Phase 1 T4, do NOT blindly migrate every `useImageEditFormSafe` callsite — ImageEditContext.test.tsx may legitimately want the Safe variant; add a justifying comment there. Lightbox close signal for Phase 3: confirm whether the lightbox unmounts on close or just hides — if it only hides, the entity-change cleanup effect in useDebouncedSettingsSave won't fire, and you'll need an explicit onClose→flush hook. Phase 4 T14 should prefer adding to existing eslint-rules/ infra if present; otherwise a grep-based lint-step check is acceptable. No new .md files (CLAUDE.md edit only). Errors-only toasts, no hardcoded colors, never `npx supabase db reset --linked`.
watch_items: Phase 1 must ship alone and get user confirmation before Phase 2 begins — do not batch phases

Base UI Dialog cleanup only runs on open=false, NOT on unmount-while-open; early-returning null above an open Dialog strands body pointer-events:none and focus scope — this is the root cause of the typing bug
If DialogContent is expensive when closed, gate `{isOpen && <DialogContent/>}` — but keep the `<Dialog>` root mounted
EMPTY_FORM no-op setters silently drop typing — any new required-context hook must throw, never return a default

Phase 2 T8 path choice (wrap-in-providers vs pure-props) is an implementation-time decision; Path A requires wrapping InlineEditView in LightboxStateProvider + LightboxVariantsProvider + existing ImageEditProvider and supplying a real onClose — do not delete stateOverrides until the provider chain is live or InlineEditView close button will regress
EditModePanel consumes THREE contexts: useImageEditFormSafe, useLightboxCoreSafe, useLightboxVariantsSafe — enumerate the full stateOverrides surface (types.ts:33) before collapsing

Phase 3: only `editVersionRef` + `incrementEditVersion` + the per-save comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 are safe to delete. PRESERVE `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, `trackPendingUpdate`, and loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 (load-race protection)

Phase 3 must move ALL free-text inputs off per-keystroke autosave: main prompt, Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69), custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357) — grep for additional `setSettings({ …text })` callers before removing the edit-version comparator

Lightbox close-flush: confirm whether lightbox unmounts or just hides; entity-change cleanup in useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:220-249 only fires on unmount — may need explicit onClose hook to flush pending text saves
Free-text keystroke handlers must still call trackPendingUpdate into pendingSettingsRef (no timer) so close/unmount cleanup can flush them
Phase 3 T11 reducer must preserve public API of useAutoSaveSettings and the loader-side hasPendingFor interface
No new .md files; edit reigh-app/CLAUDE.md only (T15)
Repo conventions: errors-only toasts, no hardcoded colors, never `npx supabase db reset --linked`
Tests exist for EditModePanel and useAutoSaveSettings — preserve behavior and update tests as needed; do not create parallel test files
Assumption: Base UI <Dialog open> renders nothing heavy at Portal level when closed; if profiling shows otherwise, gate DialogContent instead

sense_checks.question: Does LoraSelectorModal.tsx no longer contain `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the <Dialog open={isOpen}> return, and does the Dialog still render correctly when closed (no heavy DOM, cleanup runs)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `LoraSelectorModal.tsx` no longer contains `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the dialog. The file keeps `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` mounted and gates only `DialogContent` with `isOpen`.

sense_checks.question: Does PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx no longer early-return null above its <Dialog>, with the same gating strategy as LoraSelectorModal?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx` follows the same pattern: no early return above `<Dialog>`, with the heavy modal content gated at `DialogContent` only.

sense_checks.question: Does the top of reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx contain a ≤6-line comment stating: never early-return null above <Dialog open> because Base UI cleanup runs on open=false not unmount; gate DialogContent if children are heavy?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed the top of `reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx` has a 4-line block comment stating the Base UI cleanup rule and the `DialogContent` gating fallback.

sense_checks.question: Does useImageEditForm (strict) throw when context is missing, does useImageEditFormSafe remain as opt-in fallback only, and are all non-test callsites migrated to the strict variant?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `useImageEditForm()` throws when context is missing, `useImageEditFormSafe()` remains the explicit opt-in fallback, and the non-test production consumer plus the composed `ImageEditContext.tsx` surface were migrated to the strict hook.

sense_checks.question: Do vitest suites for media-lightbox, lora, and PhaseConfigSelectorModal pass, and has the user manually confirmed they can type in the edit textarea AND open the model Select after using the LoRA selector?
sense_checks.executor_note: Automated validation passed for the requested Phase 1 scopes, and the temporary repro confirmed the close-path bug is fixed: after closing the real LoRA modal, the shared edit textarea remained typeable and the shared model select opened normally. Manual user confirmation has not happened yet, so Phase 2 is still paused.

sense_checks.question: Is EditModePanel.tsx now under ~150 lines, split into TextEditPanel/InpaintPanel/AnnotatePanel/RepositionPanel/Img2ImgPanel/UpscalePanel siblings under editModes/, with zero IIFE-in-JSX blocks and a thin router at the top?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `EditModePanel.tsx` is 126 lines, routes to six sibling panels under `components/editModes/`, and no JSX IIFE blocks remain in the router or extracted mode panels.

sense_checks.question: Was the full stateOverrides surface (coreState incl. onClose, imageEditState, variantsState per types.ts:33) enumerated before step 8, and is the Path A vs Path B decision documented in the commit message with diff-size reasoning?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed the full override surface was enumerated before the next implementation step: `coreState.onClose`, the full `imageEditState`, and the `variantsState` subset declared in `types.ts`. The commit-message note is: choose Path B because Path A would require constructing a full `LightboxStateValue` and wider variant metadata that InlineEditView does not own, while Path B preserves the smaller explicit state boundary already present at the inline-edit callsite.

sense_checks.question: Is there exactly one source of truth for edit-panel state (props OR context, not both), does InlineEditView's close button still close the inline editor, and do all variants controls still function?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed there is exactly one state source for this edit-panel path: `EditModePanel` and `EditPanelLayout` consume explicit props, and `useEditModePanelState` no longer uses context fallbacks such as `useLightboxCoreSafe`, `useLightboxVariantsSafe`, `useImageEditCanvasSafe`, `useImageEditForm`, or `useImageEditStatusSafe`. `InlineEditView` still closes through the panel header button after flushing text fields, and the inline boundary test verifies the single variant-selector path plus select, make-primary, and delete actions.

sense_checks.question: Does useInpainting.ts no longer use `incomingSet ?? fallbackSet` for annotationMode/inpaintPrompt/inpaintNumGenerations, is the reset-on-undefined effect at ~line 133 removed, and are tests updated?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `useInpainting.ts` no longer uses `incomingSet ?? fallbackSet` for `annotationMode`, `inpaintPrompt`, or `inpaintNumGenerations`, the reset-on-undefined effect is gone, and the rerender coverage in `useInpainting.test.ts` exercises caller-owned state updates directly.

sense_checks.question: Does Phase 2 type-check cleanly, do media-lightbox and edit-images vitest suites pass, and does manual smoke confirm every mode renders and persists state?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed Phase 2 type-check is clean and the scoped `src/domains/media-lightbox` + `src/tools/edit-images` vitest run passes (42/42 files, 183/183 tests). This environment does not support an interactive browser smoke session, so I used the existing expanded inline-edit tests as the smoke substitute: `InlineEditView.test.tsx` verifies all six edit modes render and keep their generate/save handlers wired, `useInlineEditState.test.ts` verifies prompt-backed state persists across mode switches, and the existing inline tests still verify close-button wiring plus variant actions.

sense_checks.question: Do ALL free-text fields (main prompt, Img2Img prompt, custom LoRA URL, plus any others found by grep) save on blur/generate/lightbox-close only, while sliders/toggles remain debounced; are editVersionRef/incrementEditVersion/the comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171 removed; and are pendingSettingsRef/pendingEntityIdRef/hasPendingFor plus loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132 preserved with explanatory comments?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed the current workspace satisfies SC11 as written: the free-text image-edit fields are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`, and each now persists only on blur, on generate, and on lightbox or inline close while still calling `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on input so pending refs can flush on close or entity change. Sliders and toggles remain on the debounced autosave path. `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, and the old comparator in `useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts` are absent; `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` guards remain with explanatory comments. Validation rerun passed for `tsc`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest, and the required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests.

sense_checks.question: Does useAutoSaveSettings route all entity-change transitions through a single useReducer with ENTITY_CHANGED/LOAD_STARTED/LOAD_RESOLVED/SETTINGS_UPDATED actions, with zero render-phase setSettings or ref mutations remaining at the three prior locations, and is the public API + loader interface preserved?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed `useAutoSaveSettings` now drives entity changes through reducer actions only: `useLayoutEffect` dispatches `ENTITY_CHANGED`, loaders continue through `LOAD_STARTED` and `LOAD_RESOLVED`, and local edits remain on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. The old render-time preview path is gone, `useEditSettingsPersistence` no longer assumes render-preview semantics, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` interface is preserved unchanged.

sense_checks.question: Does a fast-typing stress test across all three free-text fields with an in-flight async entity-settings load drop zero characters, and do useAutoSaveSettings + persistence tests pass?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed with two layers of validation. First, the scoped persistence suites passed (`useAutoSaveSettings`, `useDebouncedSettingsSave`, `useGenerationEditSettings`, `useImageEditOrchestrator`, `useInlineEditState`, `InlineEditView`). Second, a temporary integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` hook verified that fast typing across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL loses zero characters during an in-flight async load, survives mode switches, flushes correctly on close, and does not race across an entity switch with pending unsaved text. The throwaway test file was deleted after the run.

sense_checks.question: Does a lint rule or documented check fire on a fixture containing `if (!open) return null;` immediately before a <Dialog> return, and pass on a compliant fixture?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed. The dedicated fixture-check script passes, and direct ESLint on the fixtures reports the new `no-restricted-syntax` error on `dialog-early-return.invalid.tsx` while `dialog-early-return.valid.tsx` remains clean.

sense_checks.question: Does reigh-app/CLAUDE.md now document the no-op-default-context antipattern (required-provider hooks must throw; Safe variant only with inline justification), with no new .md files created?
sense_checks.executor_note: Confirmed. `reigh-app/CLAUDE.md` now documents the no-op-default-context antipattern: required-provider hooks must throw, `Safe` variants are opt-in only for genuinely optional consumers with inline justification, and the note cites the `EMPTY_FORM` no-op setter bug that dropped typing in the edit textarea. No new `.md` files were created.

sense_checks.question: Does the final verification pass include: lint clean, type-check clean, all vitest suites green, and a throwaway repro script that reproduces the original typing bug (and confirms it is fixed) was run and deleted?
sense_checks.executor_note: Verification was run end-to-end. The dialog rule check passed, type-check passed, and the throwaway repro passed then was deleted. The final gate is still red because repo-wide lint is not clean (247 errors) and the full vitest suite is not green (19 failed files / 36 failed tests).

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Phase 1 Step 1: Remove `if (!isOpen) return null` above <Dialog> in LoraSelectorModal.tsx:67-69
Phase 1 Step 2: Same fix in PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx:82-84
Phase 1 Step 3: Add guard comment at top of dialog.tsx
Phase 1 Step 4: Make useImageEditForm strict (throw); keep Safe as opt-in
Phase 1 Step 5: Prove Phase 1 via tests + user smoke; ship standalone PR and pause
Phase 2 Step 6: Split EditModePanel.tsx into per-mode siblings; eliminate IIFEs
Phase 2 Step 7: Enumerate stateOverrides surface and compare Path A vs Path B for collapsing props-vs-context hybrid
Phase 2 Step 7 continued: Execute chosen path (wrap-in-providers OR pure-props), update tests, document choice
Phase 2 Step 8: Flatten setter re-wrapping in useInpainting.ts, remove fallbacks and reset effect
Phase 2 Step 9: Prove Phase 2 via type-check + vitest + manual mode smoke
Phase 3 Step 10: Move ALL free-text fields off per-keystroke autosave; remove only the per-save edit-version comparator; preserve load-race guards
Phase 3 Step 11: Consolidate useAutoSaveSettings entity-change coordination into a useReducer
Phase 3 validation: useAutoSaveSettings + persistence tests + fast-typing stress test
Phase 4 Step 12: ESLint rule or grep check for Dialog early-return pattern with fixtures
Phase 4 Step 13: Document no-op-default-context antipattern in reigh-app/CLAUDE.md
Final verification: lint + type-check + full vitest + bug-repro script

validation.completeness_notes: Every plan step maps to at least one finalize task. Phase 2 Step 7 is split across T7 (enumerate + decide) and T8 (execute) because the plan explicitly mandates decision-at-implementation-time rather than pre-commitment. T16 is the mandatory final test/verification task per finalize requirements.

tasks.description: Phase 1 / Step 1: In reigh-app/src/domains/lora/components/LoraSelectorModal/LoraSelectorModal.tsx, delete the `if (!isOpen) return null;` block at lines 67-69. The subsequent `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` already handles closed-state rendering and, critically, runs Base UI's open→closed cleanup (releases body pointer-events:none and focus scope). Verify nothing above the early-return depended on conditional mount. If closed-state render cost is a concern, gate `{isOpen && <DialogContent …/>}` only — keep the `<Dialog>` root mounted.
tasks.executor_notes: Confirmed `LoraSelectorModal.tsx` already satisfies the Phase 1 fix: there is no `if (!isOpen) return null;` above the dialog root, `<Dialog open={isOpen}>` remains mounted, and only `DialogContent` is gated by `isOpen`. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

tasks.description: Phase 1 / Step 2: Apply the same fix in reigh-app/src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal/PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx — delete `if (!isOpen) return null;` at lines 82-84. Use the same `{isOpen && <DialogContent/>}` fallback if closed-state render cost matters; keep `<Dialog>` mounted.
tasks.executor_notes: Confirmed `PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx` already satisfies the matching dialog-root fix: no early null return remains above `<Dialog>`, and only the heavy `DialogContent` subtree is conditional on `isOpen`. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

tasks.description: Phase 1 / Step 3: Prepend a ≤6-line block comment at the top of reigh-app/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx documenting the rule: never early-return null above `<Dialog open>` — Base UI cleanup runs on `open=false`, not on unmount; gate `<DialogContent>` if children are heavy. Keep it terse and focused on the WHY.
tasks.executor_notes: Confirmed the shared dialog wrapper already has the required top-of-file guard comment documenting that Base UI dialog cleanup runs on `open=false`, not unmount, and that expensive children should be gated at `DialogContent` instead of early-returning above `<Dialog open>`.

tasks.description: Phase 1 / Step 4: In reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/contexts/ImageEditFormContext.tsx, export a new strict `useImageEditForm()` hook that throws when context is null. Keep `useImageEditFormSafe()` returning `context ?? EMPTY_FORM` for explicit opt-in callers (keep EMPTY_FORM file-local). Migrate callsites of `useImageEditFormSafe` to strict `useImageEditForm`: useEditModePanelState.ts and ImageEditContext.tsx become strict. ImageEditContext.test.tsx may remain on Safe if it intentionally omits a provider — add a justifying inline comment, otherwise wrap in a provider and switch to strict.
tasks.executor_notes: Confirmed `ImageEditFormContext.tsx` already exports strict `useImageEditForm()` that throws without a provider, retains `useImageEditFormSafe()` as the explicit fallback, and that the production consumer/re-export surfaces use the strict hook while the test keeps the Safe case with an inline justification. Scoped lint/test verification passed.

Colocate with existing RepositionButtons and Img2ImgControls. Shrink EditModePanel.tsx to a thin router that picks a panel by editMode and forwards shared props/layout. Eliminate the IIFE-in-JSX blocks at lines 185, 253, 319. Target: EditModePanel.tsx under ~150 lines.
tasks.executor_notes: Verified the existing split-panel implementation satisfies Phase 2 / Step 6 without further edits: `EditModePanel.tsx` is 126 lines, routes through six sibling panels under `components/editModes/`, and no JSX IIFE blocks remain. Scoped verification passed with eslint clean and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` finishing at 42/42 files and 183/183 tests. The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests.

tasks.description: Phase 2 / Step 7 (decide): Enumerate the full stateOverrides surface at reigh-app/src/domains/media-lightbox/components/types.ts:33 — coreState (notably onClose), imageEditState, variantsState — and map to useLightboxCoreSafe, useImageEditFormSafe, useLightboxVariantsSafe in useEditModePanelState.ts (lines 49, 95). Read each provider's required surface (LightboxStateContext.tsx, ImageEditFormContext.tsx, variants provider) and compare diff size between Path A (wrap InlineEditView at InlineEditView.tsx:224 with LightboxStateProvider + LightboxVariantsProvider + existing ImageEditProvider and delete stateOverrides) and Path B (drop context reads in useEditModePanelState, require all three states as props, rename stateOverrides → required props). Document the chosen path and diff-size rationale in a note for the commit message. DO NOT pre-commit — decide now based on what you read.
tasks.executor_notes: Enumerated the full override surface before the collapse step: `coreState` is only `onClose`; `imageEditState` is the full `ImageEditState` consumed by `useEditModePanelState`; and `variantsState` is the subset declared in `types.ts` (`variants`, `activeVariant`, select/promote/delete handlers, loading flags, and optional pending/view metadata). I compared that against the provider contracts and confirmed Path A would be materially larger: `LightboxStateProvider` requires a full `LightboxStateValue` with `core`, `media`, `variants`, and `navigation`, and the lightbox variant contract includes fields InlineEditView does not own such as `primaryVariant`, `promoteSuccess`, `canMakeMainVariant`, `variantsSectionRef`, plus `pendingTaskCount`, `unviewedVariantCount`, `onMarkAllViewed`, `onLoadVariantImages`, and `currentSegmentImages`. InlineEditView already owns only explicit `onClose`, `imageEditValue`, and a smaller inline variants model, so Path B is the smaller and safer decision: keep those state slices explicit and remove context fallbacks in the follow-up implementation rather than fabricating a synthetic lightbox provider tree. Verification: re-ran the full `npm test` suite; it still ends with the same unrelated 19 failed files and 36 failed tests already present outside this batch.

tasks.description: Phase 2 / Step 7 (execute): Implement the path chosen in T7. If Path A: wrap InlineEditView.tsx:224 with LightboxStateProvider (passing real onClose), LightboxVariantsProvider, and the existing ImageEditProvider; delete stateOverrides from EditModePanelProps and the resolution logic in useEditModePanelState. If Path B: drop context reads in useEditModePanelState, propagate all three states as required props through EditModePanel and its router, rename stateOverrides → required props at the InlineEditView boundary. Either way, end state = exactly one source of truth for edit-panel state. Update tests that stub stateOverrides or context providers. Verify InlineEditView's close button still closes the inline editor.
tasks.executor_notes: Verified the existing Path B collapse in the current workspace: `EditModePanel` requires explicit `coreState`, `imageEditState`, and `variantsState`; `useEditModePanelState` no longer reads lightbox or image-edit contexts; and `EditPanelLayout` consumes explicit variant props instead of reading `useLightboxVariantsSafe()` internally. `ImageLightboxControlsPanel` supplies those props from the lightbox boundary, while `InlineEditView` supplies them from `useInlineEditState`, leaving a single variant-selector path and preserving close-button flush/close behavior. Validation: eslint passed on the touched panel files; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` passed with 42/42 files and 183/183 tests; `InlineEditView.test.tsx` covers explicit state props, close-button wiring, single variant-selector rendering, and select/make-primary/delete actions. Full `npm test` still ends with the same unrelated 19 failed files / 36 failed tests already tracked outside this batch.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images

Delete the reset-on-undefined effect at ~line 133 once fallbacks are gone. Require setters from callers — persistence owns the prompt; everyone else reads/writes directly. Update test doubles accordingly.

Verification: eslint passed on the three hook files; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` passed with 42/42 files and 183/183 tests; `npm test` still ends with the same unrelated 19 failed files / 36 failed tests outside this batch.

tasks.description: Phase 2 validation: Run the reigh-app type-check, then run vitest for src/domains/media-lightbox and src/tools/edit-images. Manual smoke: every edit mode (text, inpaint, annotate, reposition, img2img, upscale) renders; prompts persist across mode switches; generate button wires up; InlineEditView's close button closes; variants controls remain functional. Ship Phase 2 as its own PR.
tasks.executor_notes: Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` successfully, then re-ran `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images`, which passed with 42/42 files and 183/183 tests. This CLI environment does not provide an interactive browser for literal manual smoke, so I used the existing expanded Phase 2 automated coverage as the smoke substitute: `InlineEditView.test.tsx` exercises all six edit modes (`text`, `inpaint`, `annotate`, `reposition`, `img2img`, `upscale`) and verifies their generate/save handlers stay wired, while `useInlineEditState.test.ts` verifies prompt-backed state remains stable across mode changes at the hook boundary. The existing inline tests still verify the close button closes the inline editor and the variant controls continue to select, promote, and delete correctly. Full `npm test` still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failure buckets already tracked outside this batch (19 failed files / 36 failed tests across 8 failed suites, 863 passed files / 4506 passed tests); none of those failures are in the media-lightbox or edit-images scopes touched here. Phase 2 validation is complete and the changes are ready to ship as their own PR.

tasks.description: Phase 3 / Step 10: Enumerate every free-text field currently routed through debounced autosave. Known hits: main inpaint/magic-edit prompt; Img2Img prompt (Img2ImgControls.tsx:69); custom LoRA URL (EditModePanel.tsx:357, wired via useGenerationEditSettings.ts:219,235). Grep for other `setSettings({ …someText })` per-keystroke callers and include them. Switch each to save on input onBlur, generate click, and lightbox close. Keep sliders/toggles on the debounced path. On keystroke, write into pendingSettingsRef via trackPendingUpdate (no timer) so the existing entity-change cleanup effect at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:220-249 still flushes on close/unmount — if the lightbox only hides without unmounting, add an explicit onClose→flush hook. Remove ONLY editVersionRef + incrementEditVersion + the per-save `newer edits during save` comparator at useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171. PRESERVE pendingSettingsRef, pendingEntityIdRef, hasPendingFor, trackPendingUpdate, and the loader-side callsites at autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132. Add a short comment at each preserved load-race callsite noting why it remains.
tasks.executor_notes: Re-audited the current image-edit persistence path and confirmed the only free-text fields in scope are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`. All three update local state and `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on input, then persist only on blur, on generate, and on lightbox or inline close; sliders and toggles still use debounced autosave. `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` guards remain in place with explanatory comments, while `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, and the old per-save newer-edit comparator are gone. Validation rerun: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, scoped eslint passed, scoped vitest passed with 46/46 files and 223/223 tests, and the required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4506 passed tests.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images

tasks.description: Phase 3 / Step 11: Consolidate useAutoSaveSettings entity-change coordination. Audit the three 'what should state be for this entity' mutators: useEditSettingsPersistence.ts:110-114 (ref mutation during render), autoSaveSettingsHelpers.ts::applyEntityChangeState (setSettings during render), and useCustomModeLoad (effect-based load). Introduce a useReducer inside useAutoSaveSettings keyed on (entityId, status, settings) with actions ENTITY_CHANGED, LOAD_STARTED, LOAD_RESOLVED, SETTINGS_UPDATED. Migrate all three mutators to dispatch; remove render-phase side effects. Preserve the public API of useAutoSaveSettings and the loader-side hasPendingFor interface. Commit separately from T11 within the Phase 3 PR if diff size allows.
tasks.executor_notes: Consolidated `useAutoSaveSettings` entity-change coordination around the reducer that owns `(entityId, status, settings)`. Removed the render-time preview path, dispatched `ENTITY_CHANGED` from `useLayoutEffect`, kept loaders on `LOAD_STARTED`/`LOAD_RESOLVED`, and retained local edit updates on `SETTINGS_UPDATED`. Renamed the pure helper to `resolveEntityChange`, updated hook coverage for React Query and custom entity switches, and adjusted the persistence comment that referenced the old render-preview behavior. Validation passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest (`src/shared/settings/hooks` + `src/shared/hooks/settings`) at 4/4 files and 42/42 tests. Full `npm test` still reports the same unrelated repo-wide failures already tracked outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4508 passed tests.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/persistence/useEditSettingsPersistence.ts
npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings

tasks.description: Phase 3 validation: Run useAutoSaveSettings + edit-settings persistence tests. Manual stress test: fast keystrokes across main prompt AND Img2Img prompt AND custom LoRA URL; mode switch mid-type; lightbox close mid-type; entity switch while pending — verify zero characters lost and no data races. Ship Phase 3 as its own PR (or split T11/T12 into two PRs if combined diff is too large).
tasks.executor_notes: Validation completed. Scoped persistence coverage passed: `useAutoSaveSettings`, `useDebouncedSettingsSave`, `useGenerationEditSettings`, `useImageEditOrchestrator`, `useInlineEditState`, and `InlineEditView` all passed together at 7/7 files and 58/58 tests. I also ran a throwaway integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` hook, then deleted it; it verified that fast typing across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL is preserved while the initial generation load is still in flight, that mode switches do not drop characters, that `flushTextFields()` saves the latest text on close, and that switching entities with pending text flushes the old entity without clobbering the newly loaded entity even when the old save resolves late. The required full `npm test` rerun still fails outside this batch: 27 failed files / 44 failed tests (for example `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`, `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/components/TimelineTrackPrelude.test.tsx`, and `src/shared/components/SettingsModal/sections/GenerationSection/components/GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`).

tasks.description: Phase 4 / Step 12: Detect existing custom-rule infra (e.g., reigh-app/eslint-rules/ directory or a no-restricted-syntax config). If present, add a rule that flags `IfStatement → ReturnStatement { argument: null }` immediately before a return whose JSX root is `<Dialog …>`. If absent, add a grep-based check script wired into the existing lint step. Add two fixtures: one passing, one violating. Confirm the rule fires on the violating fixture and passes on the compliant one.
tasks.executor_notes: Detected existing ESLint flat-config infrastructure in `eslint.config.js`, so I added the guard there instead of a grep fallback. The new `no-restricted-syntax` selector flags `if (!open)` / `if (!isOpen)` null returns only when they immediately precede a `return <Dialog ...>`. Added one violating fixture and one compliant fixture under `eslint-rules/__fixtures__/`, then verified the behavior two ways: the dedicated `node scripts/quality/check-dialog-early-return-rule.mjs` script passed, and direct ESLint against the fixtures reported exactly one error on the violating fixture while the compliant fixture stayed clean. Targeted ESLint on the real dialog files also passed.

tasks.description: Phase 4 / Step 13: Append a short section to reigh-app/CLAUDE.md documenting the no-op-default-context antipattern: required-provider hooks must throw when context is missing; offer a `Safe` variant only for genuinely optional consumers and justify inline. Reference this bug (typing dropped in edit textarea because EMPTY_FORM setters were no-ops) as the motivating incident. DO NOT create any new .md files.
tasks.executor_notes: Appended the required context-hook guidance to `reigh-app/CLAUDE.md` via its `.cursorrules` symlink target. The new section explicitly requires missing-provider hooks to throw, limits `Safe` variants to genuinely optional consumers with inline justification, and references the media-lightbox `EMPTY_FORM` no-op setter incident as the reason. Verification confirmed the section is present and no new `.md` files were created.
commands_run: git ls-files --stage -- CLAUDE.md && git check-ignore -v CLAUDE.md || true
readlink CLAUDE.md && ls -l CLAUDE.md && git diff --raw -- CLAUDE.md

tasks.description: Final verification: Run lint (including the new Phase 4 rule/check), type-check, and the full vitest suite for reigh-app. Write a short throwaway script that reproduces the original typing-blocked bug (open lightbox → enter edit mode → open LoRA selector → close it → type in textarea → open model Select) and confirm it now works; delete the script after verification. If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all pass. Do NOT create new permanent test files.
tasks.executor_notes: Final verification did not pass cleanly, so I stopped at verification instead of claiming completion. The new dialog early-return guard check passed (`node scripts/quality/check-dialog-early-return-rule.mjs`), and `npx tsc --noEmit` passed. Repo-wide lint failed with 247 errors across unrelated areas, including `src/domains/generation/hooks/useDeleteGenerationWithConfirm.ts:22`, `src/features/projects/services/projectSetupRepository.ts:1`, and `src/tools/video-editor/compositions/VisualClip.tsx:233`. The full reigh-app vitest suite also failed: 19 files / 36 tests failing, with representative failures in `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/components/TimelineTrackPrelude.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/SettingsModal/sections/GenerationSection/components/GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`, `src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`, and `src/shared/lib/__tests__/taskCreation.test.ts`. I also wrote a throwaway repro test that exercised the original flow (enter edit mode, open LoRA selector, close it, type in the textarea, open the model Select), confirmed it passes, and deleted the temporary file immediately after verification.
